items.issue: POST test asserts 'expect(set).not.toHaveBeenCalledWith(expect.anything())' — since set is never called this passes trivially and the shape is confusing.
items.fix: Use 'expect(set).not.toHaveBeenCalled()' to assert the POST handler never mutates the session.

items.issue: Warning text 'Providing a false address is an act of fraud' is a complete sentence but dropped its trailing full stop when moved (was 'an act of fraud.').
items.fix: Restore the full stop: 'Providing a false address is an act of fraud.'
